channel.title: Recent & Upcoming Talks on MALF
channel.description: Recent content in Recent & Upcoming Talks on MALF

item.title: Clinical Epidemiology in the Era of the Big Data Revolution: New Opportunities.
Ensemble Learning Targeted Maximum Likelihood Estimation, at London.
item.description: Embed your slides or video here using shortcodes. Further details can easily be added using Markdown and $\rm \LaTeX$ math code.

item.title: Paradoxical collider effect in the analysis of non-communicable disease epidemiological data: a reproducible illustration and web application .
item.description: Embed your slides or video here using shortcodes. Further details can easily be added using Markdown and $\rm \LaTeX$ math code.

item.title: The Delta-Method and Influence Function in Medical Statistics: a Reproducible Tutorial.
